title: Shell Script for Fröhlich et al. (10.1093/nar/gky765)
author: Fröhlich, Kathrin S
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Shell scripts for the RNA-Seq analysis of the following study: Fröhlich KS, Förstner KU, Gitai Z. Post-transcriptional gene regulation by an Hfq-independent small RNA in Caulobacter crescentus. Nucleic Acids Res. 2018 Aug 27. https://doi.org/10.1093/nar/gky765. The sequencing data are deposited at NCBI GEO under the accession number GSE104186.
